title: Caramelized Floral Oats Porridge
description: A floral, crisp, indulgent Turkish dish featuring porridge oats, air-fried and vegan-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp agave nectar or maple syrup

instructions: Combine oats, coconut milk, lemon juice, agave nectar/syrup, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
Mix until the mixture forms a thick porridge-like consistency.
Transfer the mixture to an air fryer basket lined with parchment paper.
Air-fry at 350°F for about 12-15 minutes, turning halfway through cooking time.
Remove from air fryer and let it cool slightly before serving.
